summary: Created mediaPersistence.ts with setBlob/getBlob/deleteBlob (quizzl-media-blobs/blobs store keyed by '{groupId}:{sha256}'), addMessageRef/removeMessageRef/getMessageRefs (quizzl-media-meta/meta store), and clearGroupMedia (prefix-filtered delete on both stores). Created IdbKeyValueStoreBackend adapter bridging idb-keyval UseStore to KeyValueStoreBackend<T> interface. MarmotContext.tsx: added GroupMediaStore+IdbKeyValueStoreBackend mediaFactory to MarmotClient constructor and clearGroupMedia(groupId) call in leaveGroup between clearPollData and clearUnreadGroup. clear-state.ts: added quizzl-media-blobs and quizzl-media-meta to INDEXEDDB_DATABASES. 12 unit tests with inline Map mock pass.
